description: Use this API to modify or add new GIC sub station data to the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.8.0. ierr = gic_substn(subnum,realar,charar,earthmdl)

parameters.name: subnum
parameters.description: Sub station number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: earthmdl
parameters.description: Sub station earth conductivity model name. (input; ‘’ by default).

realar.description: Substation grounding DC resistance in ohms. For ungrounded substation RG <=0 or RG >=99 (0.1 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rg’.

charar.description: Method used to specify RG value, RGFLAG may be up to 40 characters. It is used for informational purposes only., can also be specified with keyword ‘rgflag’.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
